allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat: copy button, model search, token/cost tracking, persistent search context & citation links' --body ' *)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI" -Filter gh.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName)
